legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is decriminalized in Sri Lanka / ශ්‍රී ලංකාව. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is mixed. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is decriminalized in Sri Lanka / ශ්‍රී ලංකාව. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is mixed. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Sri Lanka}} The sale of cannabis is decriminalized for traditional medicine vendors and it is commonly used in [[Ayurveda|Ayurvedic]] traditional medicines.<ref>{{citation |url = http://news.nidahasa.com/news.php?go=fullnews&newsid=833 |title = Marijuana Should be Allowed; Sri Lanka Indigenous Medicine Minister Says :: NIDAHASA News |publisher = News.nidahasa.com |date = 2 July 2009 |access-date = 17 February 2011 |archive-date = 17 December 2019 |archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20191217032232/http://news.nidahasa.com/news.php?go=fullnews&newsid=833 |url-status = live }}</ref>
